contentPattern.structure: responsive 3-up grid of article cards; each card: image + category label + heading + description + date/read-time meta; whole card is a link; optional category filter bar above the grid

suitableFor: blog or journal article/post listing grids with images
news or content-index card grids with category label and date/read-time meta
image-led card grids where each card links to a detail page
listings that need an optional category filter bar
notSuitableFor: single large featured/hero article card (use cards-featured)
product cards with price and add-to-cart (use cards-product)
text-only testimonial, reasons, or event card grids without images
